description.en: Returns aPromisewhich fulfills with an array ofDetectedBarcodeobjects with the following properties:boundingBox: ADOMRectReadOnly, which returns the dimensions of a rectangle representing the extent of a detected barcode, aligned with the image.cornerPoints: The x and y co-ordinates of the four corner points of the detected barcode relative to the image, starting with the top left and working clockwise. This may not be square due to perspective distortions within the image.format: The detected b
